title: Bubble Cobble (Legacy)
body:
⠀ ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e656163a353938ac829703baba0c4ee3f8644df6.png) ##### _(The modpack has nothing to do with bubbles. that's just the name of our group, and the icon is our mascot!)_ **Bubble Cobble** is a _"Curated Kitchen Sink"_ Forge modpack intended for use by ourselves and our friends friends. It's designed to be a community server kind of experience for a world with friends that drop in and out all the time. Tons of improvements to low-tech, villages, farming, food, exploration and more, all carefully configured and tweaked to bring out the best of every single mod. There's a little something-something for everyone, so we've decided to make the modpack public for people to enjoy! The stars of the show are [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) and [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), which are made to work nicely through [Create: Cobblemon Industrialized](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-cobblemon-industrialized) and [Cobblemon: Klinks and Klangs](https://modrinth.com/mod/klinksnklangs); or immerse yourself in farming and cooking with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) with plenty of addons, including custom-made brewable wines and liquors! ![Bubble-Cobble food and drinks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10dde7a94189e35a0b147c522e659fe9f63abf1f.gif) Oculus is included in the modpack, but it comes with no included shaders. Feel free to install your favorite shaders in the video settings! #### Link to a [spreadsheet with all the mods](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1btr9XEVb_YBHp2d2Kab8lM6oAPGT0kPUlVkCO6WcJSk), organized neatly!
List of features exclusive to this modpack
  • The Sopping Wet Thing!
  • [To be expanded]
------- ### Technical Details: - This modpack is based on Forge; with this being a hefty modpack, we recommend to allocate at least 4GB of memory to Minecraft. 6GB is recommended. -------- ###### _Note that, being an organized thing between a private group of friends, the modpack is subject to changing at (almost) all times, adding or removing mods on a whim. Check the changelogs whenever the modpack updates! And make sure to support the original authors!_
